cloudwatch.anomalydetector.range.CfnAbou: Each `Range` specifies one range of days or times to exclude from use for training or updating an anomaly detection model.

cloudwatch.anomalydetector.range.EndTime.Description: The end time of the range to exclude. The format is `yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss`. For example, `2019-07-01T23:59:59`.

cloudwatch.anomalydetector.range.StartTi.Description: The start time of the range to exclude. The format is `yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss`. For example, `2019-07-01T23:59:59`.
